TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Guanshan, title = Guanshan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Guanshan} }

S.FORM: Guanshan Nsgan Guanshan o gaga Nsgan Taitung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 60.34 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 5.4 km², dxgal pmblxan o 1.18 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 3,845, sapah o 1,392, seejiq tnpusu 1,704 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 44%(Sbnawan). Nsgan alang o seejiq klmukan ka pusu(hbaraw) balay. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Guanshan o niqan 7 alang ni maxal 6. 6 o, Parupu , Takofan , Himoti , Ciwcia , Cu ki ngo , Cipurungan . pusupnyahan patas
S.PHON: guansħan nsgan guansħan o gaga nsgan taituŋ, kmpɾaan kana dxgal o **.** km*, (dxgal dgijaq o *.* km*, dxgal pmblxan o *.** km*). kmħbɾagan ħiji o *,***, sapaħ o *,***, səəɟiq tnpusu *,*** ħiji, knħbɾagan ħiji o **%(sbnawan). nsgan alaŋ o səəɟiq klmukan ka pusu(ħbaɾaw) balaj. njusan qpaħan nsgan guansħan o niqan * alaŋ ni maxal *. * o, paɾupu , tako*an , ħimoti , ʦiwʦia , ʦu ki ŋo , ʦipuɾuŋan . pusupnjaħan patas
S.FORM: Guanshan Nsgan Guanshan o gaga Nsgan Taitung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 60.34 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 5.4 km², dxgal pmblxan o 1.18 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 3,845, sapah o 1,392, seejiq tnpusu 1,704 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 44%(Sbnawan). Nsgan alang o seejiq klmukan ka pusu(hbaraw) balay. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Guanshan o niqan 7 alang ni maxal 6. 6 o, Parupu , Takofan , Himoti , Ciwcia , Cu ki ngo , Cipurungan . pusupnyahan patas
